_comment: InstaMom University color schemes for Dawn. This mirrors the shape of the 'color_schemes' object inside Dawn's config/settings_data.json (Dawn 15.x). Two ways to use it: (1) set each swatch by hand in Theme editor -> Colors using the hex values below, or (2) if you're comfortable editing code, merge these entries into the color_schemes object in settings_data.json. Key names can shift between Dawn versions, so compare against your file before pasting.

scheme-1._note: Default page scheme: yellow 'paper' background, navy text, pink primary buttons.

scheme-2._note: Navy band scheme: for the featured-collection / feature-row bands (gold buttons on navy).

scheme-3._note: Card / surface scheme: white background, gold shadow to echo the prototype's hard-shadow cards.
